X0900A_MDFCTN_TRNSCRPT_ERR_CD X0900A Reason for Modification: Transcription Error Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for modification of the prior erroneous record is related to a transcription error. 0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2023
